conversation.content:
Reconcile the following columns. Document has 7 pages. Sources are anonymous (A and B).

COLUMNS:

---
Column 1: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Synchronous
Definition: What indicates whether the results of the clinical trial were reported based on prognostic groups with synchronous metastases, where synchronous metastases refers to metastases present at the time of diagnosis of prostate cancer. with a response of either "yes" (Y) or "no" (N)? Answer Yes or No;
  A: value="Y" | page=3 | modality=text | reasoning="The study reports OS for 'patients with metastases at diagnosis' (synchronous) on page 3 and 'de novo metastatic diseases' on page 5."
  B: value="Y" | page=3 | modality=table | reasoning="Page 3, Table 1 lists 'Metastases at diagnosis, n (%)'. Page 4 mentions 'In patients with metastases at diagnosis, median OS was 11.1 mo longer in the ADT plus D arm compared with the ADT arm...'. This indicates reporting based on synchronous metastases."

---
Column 2: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Metachronous
Definition: What indicates whether the results of the clinical trial were reported based on prognostic groups of patients with metachronous diseases (diseases that occur at different times). with a response of either "yes" (Y) or "no" (N)? Answer Yes or No
  A: value="Y" | page=3 | modality=text | reasoning="The study reports OS for 'patients with metastatic disease after failure of local treatment' (metachronous) on page 3 and 'secondary metastatic diseases' on page 5."
  B: value="Y" | page=3 | modality=table | reasoning="Page 3, Table 1 lists 'Metastases after treatment for local disease, n (%)'. Page 4 mentions 'For patients with metastases after failure of local treatment, median OS was not reached...'. This indicates reporting based on metachronous diseases."

---
Column 3: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | High volume
Definition: What indicates whether the results of the clinical trial were reported based on prognostic groups with high volume/burden of metastases, with a response of either "yes" (Y) or "no" (N)? Answer Yes or No
  A: value="Y" | page=2 | modality=text | reasoning="The study explicitly states 'We retrospectively retrieved data on metastatic volume... applying the CHAARTED definition of HVD and low-volume disease (LVD) and updated survival analyses.' and presents OS data for HVD patients."
  B: value="Y" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="Page 1 states 'Retrospective analysis was by tumor volume.' and 'Survival benefits of docetaxel (D) added to androgen-deprivation therapy (ADT) were shown in the CHAARTED trial in patients with metastatic high-volume disease (HVD).' Page 2 defines HVD and states 'We present long-term outcomes in the"

---
Column 4: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Low volume
Definition: What indicates whether the results were reported based on prognostic groups having a low volume of metastasis, with a yes or no response (Y/N)? Answer Yes or No
  A: value="Y" | page=2 | modality=text | reasoning="The study explicitly states 'We retrospectively retrieved data on metastatic volume... applying the CHAARTED definition of HVD and low-volume disease (LVD) and updated survival analyses.' and presents OS data for LVD patients."
  B: value="Y" | page=2 | modality=text | reasoning="Page 2 defines LVD and states 'We present long-term outcomes in the overall population and in the HVD and LVD subgroups.'"

---
Column 5: Adverse Events - N (%) | All-Cause Grade 3 or Higher | Treatment
Definition: What the number and percentage of patients experiencing adverse events of all causes with a grade of 3 or higher in the treatment arm of the trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document does not report the number or percentage of all-cause Grade 3 or higher adverse events for the treatment arm."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="No specific data found for all-cause Grade 3 or higher adverse events in the treatment arm."

---
Column 6: Adverse Events - N (%) | All-Cause Grade 3 or Higher | Control
Definition: What number and percentage of patients experiencing all-cause adverse events with a grade of 3 or higher in the control arm of the trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document does not report the number or percentage of all-cause Grade 3 or higher adverse events for the control arm."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="No specific data found for all-cause Grade 3 or higher adverse events in the control arm."

---
Column 7: Adverse Events - N (%) | Treatment-related Grade 3 or Higher | Treatment
Definition: What number and percentage of patients experiencing treatment-related adverse events with a grade of 3 or higher in the treatment arm of the trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document only reports treatment-related Grade 5 events (deaths), not the overall count for Grade 3 or higher treatment-related adverse events."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="No specific data found for treatment-related Grade 3 or higher adverse events in the treatment arm, other than Grade 5 deaths."

---
Column 8: Adverse Events - N (%) | Treatment-related Grade 3 or Higher | Control
Definition: What the number and percentage of patients experiencing adverse events that are related to the treatment and have a severity grade of 3 or higher in the control arm of the clinical trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document does not report any treatment-related Grade 3 or higher adverse events for the control arm."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="No specific data found for treatment-related Grade 3 or higher adverse events in the control arm."

---
Column 9: Adverse Events - N (%) | Treatment-related Grade 5 | Treatment
Definition: What the number and percentage of patients showing adverse events that are treatment-related and have a grade of 5 in the treatment arm of the trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="4 (2.08%)" | page=4 | modality=text | reasoning="The text states 'Four treatment-related deaths occurred during the course of chemotherapy in the ADT plus D arm'. The ADT plus D arm had 192 patients (Table 1). (4/192)*100 = 2.08%."
  B: value="4 (2.08%)" | page=4 | modality=text | reasoning="Page 4 states 'Four treatment-related deaths occurred during the course of chemotherapy in the ADT plus D arm'. The total number of patients in the ADT plus D arm is 192 (Page 2). Percentage = (4/192) * 100 = 2.08%."

---
Column 10: Adverse Events - N (%) | Treatment-related Grade 5 | Control
Definition: What the number and percentage of patients experiencing treatment-related adverse events with a grade of 5 in the control arm of the clinical trial? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document only reports treatment-related deaths in the ADT plus D arm, with no mention of such events in the ADT alone (control) arm."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="No specific data found for treatment-related Grade 5 adverse events in the control arm."


Submit verification for easy columns first. For disputed columns, use get_page then submit.
